title: About Interview Me
subtitle: A smarter way to connect talent with opportunity

what.title: What is Interview Me?
what.description: Interview Me is a platform where professionals create a public profile with their experience, projects, skills and career stories. The key feature: each profile has an AI-powered chat that works as an automated pre-interview. Visitors ask questions and the AI answers based on the professional's real data.

how.title: How It Works
how.step1Desc: Add your experience, education, projects, skills and stories. The more detail you provide, the better the AI represents you.
how.step2Desc: Get a public profile URL like /p/your-name. Share it with recruiters, on LinkedIn, or in job applications.
how.step3Desc: Recruiters visit your profile and chat with the AI to learn about your background — before even scheduling a call.

forRecruiters.title: For Recruiters
forRecruiters.description: Imagine being able to pre-screen candidates by chatting with an AI that knows their full background. No more reading through lengthy resumes — just ask what you need to know.
forRecruiters.bullet1: Pre-screen candidates in minutes, not hours
forRecruiters.bullet2: Ask specific questions about skills and experience
forRecruiters.bullet3: Get answers grounded in the candidate's real data

forProfessionals.title: For Professionals
forProfessionals.description: Stand out from the crowd. Instead of sending a static resume, share a living profile that can answer questions about your career 24/7.
forProfessionals.bullet2: AI handles preliminary interviews for you
forProfessionals.bullet3: Track who visits and what they ask

cta.title: Ready to try?
cta.description: Create your profile in minutes and start sharing your smart career link.
